heroPacientes.subtitulo: Doctors, psychologists and specialists available in minutes. No queues, no travel. From your phone or computer.

beneficios.subtitulo: A new way to take care of your health: accessible, immediate and hassle-free.

items.espera_desc: Your appointment is at the time you chose. No 40-minute wait in a hallway or commuting.
items.especialistas_desc: Access professionals who may not be in your city. The best care no matter where you are.
items.resenas_desc: All reviews are from patients who actually consulted. Choose with real information.
items.privacidad_desc: Your medical information is encrypted under the highest security standards.

items.paso1_desc: Find the specialist you need. Filter by specialty, availability and ratings.
items.paso2_desc: Select the time that works best for you, confirm your appointment and pay securely.
items.paso3_desc: Connect with your doctor via video call. Receive your prescription or diagnosis instantly.

consultasTabs.subtitulo: Choose your specialty and find professionals available in minutes.

especialidades.clinico_desc: General consultations, diagnoses, health follow-up and more.

items.texto: I didn't have to leave home with my sick child. Within 5 minutes I was talking to a doctor. The prescription arrived instantly.
Incredible speed. Whenever I needed it I had a doctor available. The digital medical record is a huge differentiator.
I use it for the whole family. The professionals are very attentive and the system is super easy. I recommend it to everyone.

items.pregunta: Do I need to download an app?
items.respuesta: No, OnDoctor365 works directly from your browser. You only need an internet connection and a camera.
Yes, minors can be attended with the presence and authorization of a responsible adult.
Yes, all prescriptions have certified digital signatures and are legally valid nationwide.

items.pregunta: What if the doctor can't attend me immediately?
items.respuesta: You can book a scheduled appointment or join the waiting list. We'll notify you when there's availability.
Yes, all your information is encrypted. Only you and your doctor have access to your records.

ctaFinal.subtitulo: Sign up for free and access the best health professionals in minutes.

empresasConfianza.texto: With the <accent>trust</accent> of health organizations and professionals committed to <accent>more efficient medical care.</accent>

items.descripcion: What I value most is being able to attend my patients from anywhere. The platform simplifies the entire process.
I can connect with my patients securely and maintain continuous follow-up without complications.
My patients have everything in one place: appointments, meal plans and follow-up. It's very easy to use.

heroEmpresas.subtitulo: Telemedicine, on-site care kiosks and medical AI integrated into a single system. For companies, providers and insurers.

problemas.titulo: Teams lose days due to lack of

items.texto: Employees lose hours in waiting rooms or coordinating appointments with specialists.
Absenteeism and low productivity have an invisible but enormous cost for the company.

solucion.desc: OnDoctor365 eliminates medical access barriers for your team, no matter where they are.

campos.mensaje_placeholder: Tell us about your organization and what you need...

ecosistema.subtitulo: From remote care to physical presence with technology. Four solutions that complement each other.

totem.desc: Virtual medical care room for installation at your company. Integrated sensors, real-time video consultation and electronic prescriptions. No doctor on site.

reconocimiento.desc: international awards and accreditations in innovation

maletin.desc: For critical environments: vessels, aviation, field and desert. Medical grade with 5G connectivity.

guardia.desc: AI-powered triage for hospital admission. Reduces wait times, simplifies admission and improves diagnostic accuracy before the medical consultation.

plataforma.desc: App and web for 24/7 consultations. Smart scheduling, unified medical records and corporate health dashboard.

heroProfesionales.subtitulo: Join the leading telemedicine platform. Online scheduling, digital medical records, video consultations and automatic payments. All in one place.

metricas.subtitulo: Professionals like you growing with OnDoctor365.

items.descripcion: Professionals using OnDoctor365 triple their number of consultations in the first two months.
You keep 100% of each consultation. No surprises, no deductions, no fine print.
Save time on scheduling, payments and documentation per month to focus more on your patients.

pasosOnboarding.subtitulo: Simple, guided activation process so nothing holds you back.

items.descripcion: Complete your professional information, specialties, academic background and available hours.
Our team validates your license and activates your public profile on the platform.
Your profile appears in search results. Patients book and pay online.
You receive payment for each consultation in the first business days of each week. No commissions.

planes.subtitulo: No per-consultation fees. Choose the plan that best suits your practice.

items.descripcion: Ideal for starting to see patients and getting to know the platform.
For professionals who want to grow their practice.
For clinics and medical teams that need a scalable, integrated solution.

featuresProfesionales.subtitulo: A complete platform that simplifies your practice and extends your reach nationwide.

items.descripcion: Automatic appointment management. Patients book with you without you having to do anything.
Load diagnoses and follow-up for each patient, organized and accessible from any device.
Issue prescriptions with certified digital signature. Valid nationwide.
Track your consultations, income, notifications and more. Data to make better decisions.

items.texto: In three months I tripled my consultations. What I value most is the automatic scheduling — no more wasting time coordinating.
Being able to follow up with my patients changes my practice. The metrics dashboard is incredible.
Less time on administrative work, more time with my patients. The HIS integration was seamless.

ctaFinalProfesionales.subtitulo: Create your profile in minutes and start seeing patients from across the country.

items.pregunta: Do I need prior experience with telemedicine?
items.respuesta: No, the platform is intuitive and we guide you through every step of onboarding.
Payments are automatically credited to your bank account in the first business days of each week.

items.pregunta: Can I see patients without health insurance?
items.respuesta: Yes, you can see private patients without needing to be affiliated with any health insurer.

items.pregunta: Can I combine it with my in-person practice?
items.respuesta: Yes, the smart scheduler lets you manage both online and in-person appointments from one place.

items.pregunta: What if there are technical issues during a consultation?
items.respuesta: We have real-time technical support and a contingency protocol to reschedule at no cost.

items.texto: We implemented OnDoctor365 and in the first quarter reduced absenteeism by 28%. The team adopted it immediately — it's very intuitive.
For our company it was one of the best decisions of the year. Employees really value having medical access without leaving home.
Integration was seamless and support was excellent. In 48hs we were already operational. The usage reports are very comprehensive.

ctaFinalEmpresas.subtitulo: Over 200 companies already trust OnDoctor365 to take care of their teams' health.

items.pregunta: How can I register my company?
items.respuesta: Fill out the contact form and a specialist will guide you through the onboarding process in less than 48hs.
The digital platform is activated within 48hs. The Telemedicine Kiosk requires physical installation, which we coordinate with your team.

items.pregunta: Is the service compatible with ISO or HIS regulations?
items.respuesta: Yes, we comply with the main healthcare regulations and have native integrations with the most widely used HIS systems.

items.pregunta: Does OnDoctor365 integrate with health insurers?
items.respuesta: Yes, we integrate with the main health insurers to facilitate consultation coverage.

items.pregunta: Can internal medical reports be generated?
items.respuesta: Yes, the corporate dashboard generates usage reports, consultations by specialty, absenteeism and overall team wellbeing.

hero.subtitulo: Connect with certified psychologists in minutes. Or expand your practice with tools built for mental health.

pacientes.desc: Consult from anywhere, whenever you need it, without delays.
Your sessions are confidential. Your medical information is encrypted and protected.
Your psychologist knows your history in every session, without starting over.

profesionales.desc: Patients book and pay on their own. You just show up to deliver the session.
Record diagnoses, progress and observations for each patient in an organized way.
Receive payment for each session automatically, with no manual management or commissions.

herramientas.subtitulo: Everything you need to provide the best psychological care, without administrative friction.

items.desc: Secure virtual room with professional image and audio quality for every session.
Record progress, diagnoses and observations with organized clinical structure.
Complete patient history, accessible from any device at any time.
Patients book according to your availability. No manual coordination needed.
Payment is credited to your account every week. No commissions, no surprises.
Consultations, income, patient retention and more. Data to grow intentionally.

items.texto: I started out of necessity and wouldn't trade it for anything. In 5 minutes I was talking to an incredible psychologist. I recommend it to everyone.
I tripled my sessions in two months. Automatic scheduling freed me from hours of coordination. Now I focus only on my patients.
I was hesitant about online therapy but the private space and video quality made me forget it wasn't in person.

ctaFinal.subtitulo: Find your psychologist or join as a professional. All in one place.
